title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 0–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Kaido, King as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: One year's Worth of JILLGE

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Top Prize

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Skull Dome - Left Brain Tower - Pleasure Hall

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A mighty explosion!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ryan!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: OSOME!! Get back! You'll get hurt!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ryan!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We should move deeper into the castle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I still haven't found Chui...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't worry about him! I'm sure he's fine!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have to take care of your- self!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We need to try and find away off this island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: things are so bad, it might be best to try and escape wano itself!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...that's it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I've got it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am as much of a dragon as Kaido!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That means I can grab his flame clouds!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Nee Eeey AAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If I cannot force the Island back...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can at least stop it from getting any closer!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have to prevent the worst case scenario!! Geeeyah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This island will not destroy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...The flower capital while I still draw breath!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Inside the skull done- live floor

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We've gotta force our way out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hold them back!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Skull Dome- Left Brain Tower - Pleasure Hall

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Sparking...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...QUEEN!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 30 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
